name: devmate
description: A local-first VS Code coding assistant with project tools, sessions, and model profiles.
author: Ali Najjar

devMate.backendUrl.description: Base URL of the local DevMate backend service.

devMate.manageLocalBackend.description: Automatically start and monitor the bundled backend when backendUrl is a local HTTP address.

devMate.backendPythonPath.description: Optional Python executable used for the managed local backend. DevMate otherwise prefers its project virtual environment and then Python on PATH.

devMate.maxTokens.description: Maximum response tokens shared by model reasoning, answers, and complete Code-mode file contents.

devMate.requestTimeoutSeconds.description: How long DevMate allows each model-provider call to run. The extension automatically adds a 30-second transport buffer.

devMate.commandTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum runtime for each approved DevMate verification command.

devMate.toolCallLimit.description: Maximum project-tool calls in one DevMate request. Higher values can increase runtime, provider cost, and loop risk.

devMate.readFileMaxLines.description: Maximum lines returned by one read_file agent-tool call.

devMate.listFilesMaxResults.description: Maximum file paths returned by one list_files call.

devMate.searchCodeMaxResults.description: Maximum matches returned by one search_code call.

devMate.diagnosticsMaxResults.description: Maximum Problems entries returned by one get_diagnostics call.

devMate.terminalErrorsMaxResults.description: Maximum failed terminal commands returned by read_terminal_errors.

devMate.codeNavigationMaxResults.description: Maximum locations returned by get_symbols, find_definition, or find_references.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test --test-isolation=none tests/agentCheckpoint.test.js tests/agentToolSettings.test.js tests/agentTools.test.js tests/apiClient.test.js tests/backendManager.test.js tests/changeSummary.test.js tests/commandTools.test.js tests/context.test.js tests/conversation.test.js tests/dependencyTools.test.js tests/errorContext.test.js tests/fileChanges.test.js tests/fileTools.test.js tests/llmProfiles.test.js tests/permissions.test.js tests/projectContext.test.js tests/projectIndex.test.js tests/pythonEnvironment.test.js tests/retryPolicy.test.js tests/sessions.test.js tests/webviewScript.test.js
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:backend && npm run compile
